title: IGCAR Apprentices Online Form 2026 | Government Jobs in India | Apply Now
excerpt: IGCAR is inviting online applications for 200 Trade Apprentice posts. Interested candidates can apply from 20/07/2026 to 19/08/2026. Check eligibility, selection process, and other details.

About Organization

Indira Gandhi Centre for Atomic Research (IGCAR) is a renowned organization in India.

IGCAR is inviting online applications for 200 Trade Apprentice posts.

About the Programme

The IGCAR Trade Apprentice 2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens.

The programme aims to provide valuable experience to the selected candidates.
